description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.UpperLeather thong style straps with nubuck liningLeather toe separatorStitch detailing along the strapsSuede footbed for comfort and durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with concentric lugs for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
